productDisplayName: Puma Men Mid Bas Black Casual Shoes
description: Inspired by pop and graffiti art, the 917 Mid Bas puma shoes are all about having fun with colour. Summery, vibrant and energetic, these shoes add zing to all casual outfits. What's even better is that you get an additional pair of laces in a different colour to create a new look.UpperCanvas upper with bold punk graphics and puma logoSynthetic twill tape laces looped around eyeletsAdditional pair of laces in different colour for a new lookSynthetic rubber toe box for extra durability and protection of the forefootStitch detailing of form-stripes on the sidesHigh ankle support with additional ankle strap for snug FitMidsoleComfort insole with canvas tongue to ensure a snug, comfortable fitTextile lining for added comfortOutsoleMade of high traction gum rubberToe guard strip with tonal side-wall tripTextured to suit the anatomy of the feet for maximum gripReinforced heel with dip in back collar line to prevent Achilles tendon irritation
